positive: A stylized, symmetrical, minimalist illustration of a crescent moon and a scattering of celestial elements, such as small constellations, shooting stars, and wispy nebulae. The design should feature deep indigo and cosmic teal gradients contrasting sharply with brilliant, shimmering gold accents. Use clean, geometric silhouettes and elegant linework reminiscent of mid-century modern celestial maps. The composition must be centered and highly visible when printed on fabric, maintaining strong contrast and depth. Vector art aesthetic, intricate details, high contrast, clean lines, print-ready.
negative: blur, text, signature, watermark, low detail, artifacts, noise, excessive gore, abstract, busy, cluttered, logos, trademarks, celebrity, photo, realistic, gradient bleed, bad anatomy, extra limbs
